Previous to our coming to these valleys, I wished and prayed, that when we went to the valleys, there would not any of the wicked persons follow us, who are eternally hanging on our skirts. These arc my feelings and desires now, and the earnest wishes of hundreds and thousands of men and women who dwell in these valleys.
I am the rose of Sharon, and the lily of the valleys.
I am my beloved’s, and my beloved is mine: he feedeth among the lilies.
